description_long: This table features a unique double-bowl or figure-eight design, with two large, rounded basins connected at the center. The surface is finished in a wood-like texture, accented by a continuous turquoise trim along the rim and geometric turquoise markings inside each basin. The table is supported by two wide, blocky legs at either end, providing stability and a slightly elevated stance. The basins are deep, suggesting the table could serve as both a display and a functional surface for holding items. The overall construction appears robust, with a rustic yet modern aesthetic. The turquoise accents add a decorative, almost futuristic touch to the otherwise natural wood appearance.
description: A double-bowl, figure-eight wooden table with turquoise trim and geometric accents, supported by two wide legs. The basins are deep, giving it a distinctive and functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-bowl shape, turquoise trim, and geometric accents, with the central connection and one leg visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basins and both supporting legs, with the turquoise trim outlining the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the double-bowl design and turquoise details, with the opposite leg visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth of the basins and both legs, with turquoise trim visible.
